title: rubia austrozhejiangensis
intro: Rubia austrozhejiangensis is an extinct species of flowering plant in the madder family (Rubiaceae) known for its vibrant red roots. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its roots, which contain anthraquinones, compounds known for their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubia austrozhejiangensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as a natural dye. In herbal preparations, the roots are often dried and processed for use in traditional medicine, with some cultures using it to treat various ailments, although its use is limited due to its extinction.
